integer

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#overview)  Overview

Vast requires pre-payment of credits for GPU rentals. Once credits are purchased, they appear in your account balance.We accept credit card payments through Stripe and crypto payments through Crypto.com and Coinbase. Use the add credit button to purchase credits one-time. Use the autobilling feature to have the system automatically top up your account using a saved credit card when it runs low.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#negative-balances)  Negative Balances

Once your credits reach $0.00, your instances, storage volumes, and data **will be scheduled for deletion** unless you add credits to make your balance positive again.

- **When your balance reaches zero (or below):**
  - Your instances are **stopped automatically**.
  - While an instance is stopped, your instance is detached from its GPU(s), but your data can still be copied off the machine.
  - As with any stopped instance, **you will continue to be billed for disk storage** — even if your balance is negative.
- **If you have a payment method saved:**
  - Your credit card will be periodically and automatically charged to cover any negative balance.
  - This allows you to resume using your instances without losing data.
- **If you do not have a payment method saved:**
  - The system will have no backup payment method to charge, and will not be able to top up your balance.
  - Your instances and stored data will be **destroyed** to prevent indefinite unpaid usage.

Important: Instances showing in your account are **never free**, even if your balance is negative or zero.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#autobilling-credit-card-only)  Autobilling (credit card only)

You can set a balance threshold to configure autobilling, which will attempt to maintain your balance above the threshold by charging your card periodically.We recommend setting a threshold around your daily or weekly spend, and then setting an balance email notification threshold around 75% of that value, so that you get notified if the auto billing fails but long before your balance depletes to zero.

**WARNING**Your card is charged automatically, and any instance on your account comes with charges to your
credit balance. Even stopped instances have storage charges. Make sure you destroy instances
when you are done with them — otherwise, your card will continue to be periodically charged
after your balance goes negative.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#update-frequency)  Update Frequency

Balances are updated about once every few seconds.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#credit-card-security)  Credit Card Security

Vast.ai does not see, store or process your credit card numbers, they are passed directly to Stripe (which you can verify in the javascript).

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#refunds)  Refunds

After spending credits, there are absolutely no refunds.For unspent credits, contact us on the website chat to request a refund. In most cases we can refund unspent credits. Unfortunately Coinbase Commerce does not support refunds, so there are no refunds possible for credits purchased via Coinbase Commerce.

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#pricing)  Pricing

There are separate prices and charges for:

- Active rental (GPU) (in $/hr)
- Storage costs (in $/GB/hr)
- Bandwidth costs (in $/TB)

You are charged the base active rental cost for every second your instance is in the active/connected state.
You are charged the storage cost (which depends on the size of your storage allocation) for every single second your instance exists and is online (for all states other than offline).
Stopping an instance does not avoid storage costs.You are charged bandwidth prices for every byte sent or received to or from the instance, regardless of what state it is in.
The prices for base rental, storage, and bandwidth vary considerably from machine to machine, so make sure to check them.You are not charged active rental or storage costs for instances that are currently offline.To see a pricing breakdown on your current instances within your Instance page in the console or from offers on the Search page you can hover over the price to see pricing details.

![Price Breakdown](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/QJnQLUJ7al-eselv/images/price-breakdown.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=QJnQLUJ7al-eselv&q=85&s=3d59ddac5ab98cf0873ee4606b7c0d37)

Price breakdown shown by hovering your cursor over the listed price

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#payment-methods)  Payment Methods

We currently support major credit cards through stripe, and crypto payments through Coinbase and crypto.com.

# [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#billing-page-walkthrough)  Billing Page Walkthrough

In this section we will walk through your [billing page](https://cloud.vast.ai/billing/), which you can access from the Account section of your sidebar while logged into your Vast account.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#credits-panel)  Credits Panel

Here you can see the current amount of Vast credits you have. This section also shows what you are currently spending on instances and storage volumes.

![Credits Panel](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/sy_RooadPCWBkysO/images/billing-page-credits-panel.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=sy_RooadPCWBkysO&q=85&s=680cc8289cc73253445b8dc672084838)

Credits Panel

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#adding-credits)  Adding Credits

By clicking the **Add Credits** button in the credits panel, you can add payment methods, link accounts, and add credits to your Vast account.

![Add Credits Form](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/sy_RooadPCWBkysO/images/billing-page-add-credits.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=sy_RooadPCWBkysO&q=85&s=b9d90d736c2db099e336260845daacfc)

Add Credits Form

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#transfer-credits)  Transfer Credits

From this section, you can transfer your personal credits to a different account or team.![](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-billing.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=794f31c21f730cb2e33f0c363f9867a4)Click the **Transfer Credits** button to open a pop-up. There, you can select the destination account or team to send the credit to.

- To transfer credit to another **user**, you will need their email address.⚠️ This action is irreversible, so please double-check the email before proceeding.

![Transfer Credits pop-up](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-billing-2.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=fac1fbe8921e2155b60bb17ca45a8243)

Transfer Credits pop-up

- to transfer credit to a **team**, you should be a part of the team.

![Transfer Credit to a team](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-billing-3.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=4c258da34fe5fd3c9dd22adb47ddbe66)

Transfer Credit to a team

- To transfer credit from a team back to a personal account, you must be the team owner. You will need to switch to your team context and open Billing Page form there to see following pop-up.

![Transfer Credits](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-billing-4.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=17e6992ac9aaacd802988d33800828de)

Transfer Credits

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#transaction-history-table)  Transaction History Table

At the bottom of your billing page, you will find an itemized table of your transactions on Vast. By default, the table is open to the **Invoices** tab, where you can see all manual and automatic billing records, as well as transfers and refunds.

![Invoices tab of the Transaction History table](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/QJnQLUJ7al-eselv/images/transaction-history-table-invoices.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=QJnQLUJ7al-eselv&q=85&s=8e58c6e1fbf4c0551a0177564a4a2e26)

The Invoices tab of the Transaction History table

You can also click the **Charges** tab to see an itemized table of all charges from your instances, storage volumes, and serverless workers. Clicking the dropdown arrow on any of these items will display a more complete breakdown of those charges by type, including GPU usage, reserved disk storage, and upload/download usage.

![Charges tab of the Transaction History table](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/QJnQLUJ7al-eselv/images/transaction-history-table-charges.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=QJnQLUJ7al-eselv&q=85&s=2c5b6c9b754f9e6380c89085085c063c)

The Charges tab of the Transaction History table

You can also use this table to generate an invoice for all charges or transactions created during a custom span of time by clicking the **Export** button in the top right corner of the table. You can see more details about how to customize this invoice in the following section.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#invoice-info)  Invoice Info

Here you can add the information to be shown on invoices you generate.

![Invoice Filled](https://vast.ai/uploads/invoice-filled.png)

Invoice Filled

Here’s an example that shows where and how the invoice info appears on generated invoices:

![Invoice With Fill Circle](https://vast.ai/uploads/invoice-with-fill-circle.jpg)

Invoice With Fill Circle

If you leave your Invoice Info blank it will default to your Vast account’s email address for the “Bill To:” information.

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#common-questions)  Common Questions

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#if-i-rent-a-server-and-delete-if-after-10-minutes-will-i-pay-for-1-hour-of-usage-or-10-minutes)  If I rent a server and delete if after 10 minutes will I pay for 1 hour of usage or 10 minutes?

You will only be charged for the 10 minutes of usage.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#can-i-get-a-refund)  Can I get a refund?

If you pay with credit card you can get a refund on unspent Vast credits. We do not refund Vast credits bought with crypto.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#why-has-the-prices-changed)  Why has the prices changed?

Pricing is set by the host and is specific to each offer. You can refine your search and look for a machine that suits your needs [here](https://cloud.vast.ai/create/).

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#why-am-i-getting-the-error-%E2%80%9Cno-such-payment-method-id-none-%E2%80%9D-when-i-try-to-add-credit)  Why am I getting the error “No such payment method id None.” when I try to add credit?

Before buying credit with Stripe you must add a card!

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#am-i-charged-for-%E2%80%9Cloading%E2%80%9D-instances)  Am I charged for “Loading” instances?

No, you are not charged when it says “Loading”.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#what-happens-if-my-account-balance-is-negative)  What happens if my account balance is negative?

Once your credits reach $0.00, your instances, storage volumes, and data **will no longer be guaranteed, and will be at risk of deletion.** If you have a payment method on file, your instances may persist to be resumed once your balance is positive again.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#why-am-i-getting-charge-more-per-hour-than-expected)  Why am I getting charge more per hour than expected?

You may be see your Vast credit decline at a greater rate than expected due to upload and downloads costs, which is not shown in your cost/hrorcost/hr orcost/hrorcost/day pricing breakdowns as it is charged on a usage basis and not a constant rate. You can find these rates for bandwidth usage in the Internet: section of the pricing details, which you can see when you hover over the price in the bottom right-hand corner of instance cards within the Instance console page. You can also see pricing detail before instance creation from hovering over the prices on the Search page. You can also get a detailed document of your billing history by “Generate Billing History” within the Billing page of the console.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/billing\#why-are-my-gpus-not-showing-up-in-the-list)  Why are my GPUs not showing up in the list?

There are over 10,000+ listings on vast, and search only displays a small subset. You will usually not be able to find any one specific machine through most normal searches. To test that your machine is listed correctly, you can use the CLI:
vastai search offers ‘machine\_id=12345 verified=any’Replace 12345 with your actual machine ID
If your machine is verified, you should still be able to find it without the verified=any.[Use the CLI (preferred)](https://docs.vast.ai/cli/get-started)

[Suggest edits](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/edit/main/documentation/reference/billing.mdx) [Raise issue](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/issues/new?title=Issue%20on%20docs&body=Path:%20/documentation/reference/billing)

[Account Settings](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/account-settings) [Referral Program](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/referral-program)

Ctrl+I

Assistant

Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes.

![Price Breakdown](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/QJnQLUJ7al-eselv/images/price-breakdown.png?w=1100&fit=max&auto=format&n=QJnQLUJ7al-eselv&q=85&s=93a99b150993a58f4220d86c63b70c8c)

![Credits Panel](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/sy_RooadPCWBkysO/images/billing-page-credits-panel.png?w=1100&fit=max&auto=format&n=sy_RooadPCWBkysO&q=85&s=697a07a4f142da55b8e926a872132c1f)

[Skip to main content](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning#content-area)

[Vast.ai Documentation – Affordable GPU Cloud Marketplace home page![light logo](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN/logo/light.svg?fit=max&auto=format&n=lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN&q=85&s=7f79454b79a0cfc463ec063cd29faea0)![dark logo](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN/logo/dark.svg?fit=max&auto=format&n=lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN&q=85&s=a0ab9c5200d0f126bb744a83bc1b1ee2)](https://docs.vast.ai/)

Search...

Ctrl KAsk AI

Search...

Navigation

Host

Earning

[Documentation](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/get-started) [Examples](https://docs.vast.ai/pytorch) [SDK](https://docs.vast.ai/sdk/python/quickstart) [CLI](https://docs.vast.ai/cli/get-started) [API](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/introduction)

On this page

- [Overview](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning#overview)
- [Pages Walkthrough](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning#pages-walkthrough)
- [Payouts](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning#payouts)
- [Common Questions](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning#common-questions)
- [How can I have earnings as a Vast user?](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning#how-can-i-have-earnings-as-a-vast-user)

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning\#overview)  Overview

This page in the console allows you to manage your earnings from referrals. You can find more information about Vast’s referral program [here](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/referral-program).

# [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning\#pages-walkthrough)  Pages Walkthrough

![](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-earning.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=08dd0dd68d81144725e713523db36499)The **Earnings** page gives you a transparent view of your referral program performance and accumulated rewards. Here’s what each section means:

- **Current Balance:** This is the amount you’ve earned so far from your referred users but **haven’t been paid out yet.** It keeps growing as your referrals continue to use the platform.
- **Total Earnings**: This shows your **lifetime earnings** the total amount you’ve earned from all your referrals since you joined the earnings program or started hosting. It includes both paid and unpaid amounts.
- **Total Referral Count**: This number represents the **total users you’ve referred** who have successfully created accounts through your referral link. It’s a great way to track how your outreach is growing!
- **Total Rental Earnings**(host only) **:** This shows the total lifetime amount you’ve earned from your machine being rented out on the platform.
- **Total Referral Earnings** (host only): This shows the total lifetime amount you’ve earned from all your referrals.

Additionally, there is the **Earning Chart** section that provides a clear visual overview of your earning history.

![](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-earning-2.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=ad275fca73851d5d4eb666be12bbc764)

Earnings Chart

The **Template Performance** chart displays the earnings history from templates.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning\#payouts)  Payouts

You can view your payout history for a selected date range. Here you can generate and download invoices for your earning payouts.

![](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-earning-3.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=cbba01543d9a1805cb39027b3018286f)

Payout History

In the **Payout Account** section, you can set up a payout account.

![](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD/images/console-earning-4.webp?fit=max&auto=format&n=xCLov_y0JNSp_qUD&q=85&s=90f3ee2b0a9645ffc67332ffbd24fe3b)

Payout Account

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning\#common-questions)  Common Questions

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning\#how-can-i-have-earnings-as-a-vast-user)  How can I have earnings as a Vast user?

You can generate earnings by gaining Vast credit through template creation via our referral program. You can find more information about Vast’s referral program [here](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/reference/referral-program).

[Suggest edits](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/edit/main/documentation/host/earning.mdx) [Raise issue](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/issues/new?title=Issue%20on%20docs&body=Path:%20/documentation/host/earning)

[Datacenter Status](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/datacenter-status) [Host Payouts](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment)

Ctrl+I

Assistant

Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes.

[Vast.ai Documentation – Affordable GPU Cloud Marketplace home page![light logo](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN/logo/light.svg?fit=max&auto=format&n=lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN&q=85&s=7f79454b79a0cfc463ec063cd29faea0)![dark logo](https://mintcdn.com/vastai-80aa3a82/lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN/logo/dark.svg?fit=max&auto=format&n=lDYZh_6OFg5OOaSN&q=85&s=a0ab9c5200d0f126bb744a83bc1b1ee2)](https://docs.vast.ai/)

Navigation

Host

Host Payouts

[Documentation](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/get-started) [Examples](https://docs.vast.ai/pytorch) [SDK](https://docs.vast.ai/sdk/python/quickstart) [CLI](https://docs.vast.ai/cli/get-started) [API](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/introduction)

On this page

- [Common Questions](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment#common-questions)
- [When will I get paid?](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment#when-will-i-get-paid)
- [Why does it show paid on my invoice when I don’t see the payment in my account yet?](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment#why-does-it-show-paid-on-my-invoice-when-i-don%E2%80%99t-see-the-payment-in-my-account-yet)
- [Can I generate an invoice?](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment#can-i-generate-an-invoice)
- [How much can I make hosting on Vast?](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment#how-much-can-i-make-hosting-on-vast)

## [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment\#common-questions)  Common Questions

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment\#when-will-i-get-paid)  When will I get paid?

It takes 2 weeks to get your first payout. The pay period ends and goes pending, then you are paid for that pay period the following Friday.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment\#why-does-it-show-paid-on-my-invoice-when-i-don%E2%80%99t-see-the-payment-in-my-account-yet)  Why does it show paid on my invoice when I don’t see the payment in my account yet?

The paid status on invoices is marked as such when we send the payment list out to Paypal, Wise, Stripe, etc. This does not accurately represent the payment’s status within Paypal, Wise, Stripe, etc., bu rather shows the status of the payment solely within our system.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment\#can-i-generate-an-invoice)  Can I generate an invoice?

You can create an invoice by going to the “Billing” page, and then click the box for “Include Charges” under “Generate Billing History”.

### [​](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/payment\#how-much-can-i-make-hosting-on-vast)  How much can I make hosting on Vast?

To get an understanding of prices, the best place is 500farms which is a third party website that monitors Vast listings. The link is [here](https://500.farm/vastai/charts/d/a6RgL05nk/vast-ai-stats).

[Suggest edits](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/edit/main/documentation/host/payment.mdx) [Raise issue](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/issues/new?title=Issue%20on%20docs&body=Path:%20/documentation/host/payment)

[Earning](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/earning) [Tax Guide for Hosts](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/host/guide-to-taxes)

Ctrl+I

Assistant

Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes.

[Documentation](https://docs.vast.ai/documentation/get-started) [Examples](https://docs.vast.ai/pytorch) [SDK](https://docs.vast.ai/sdk/python/quickstart) [CLI](https://docs.vast.ai/cli/get-started) [API](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/introduction)

show invoices

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request GET \
  --url https://console.vast.ai/api/v1/invoices/ \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "select_filters": {
    "when": {
      "gte": 1748736000,
      "lte": 1764547200
    },
    "service": {
      "eq": "<string>",
      "in": [\
        "<string>"\
      ],
      "notin": [\
        "<string>"\
      ]
    }
  },
  "latest_first": true,
  "order_by": {
    "col": "paid_on",
    "dir": "desc"
  },
  "limit": 60
}
'
```

400

403

429

```
        "transfer_group": "pi_3TAbCdEfgHiJkLmN"\
      },\
      "items": []\
    }\
  ],
  "next_token": null
}
```

#### Authorizations

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-invoices#authorization-authorization)

Authorization

string

header

required

API key must be provided in the Authorization header

#### Body

application/json

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-invoices#body-select-filters)

select\_filters

object

required

Shows invoices using given filters.

Required : Filter by timerange using `when` field.

Use unix timestamps (UTC) comparison operators.

Example : To filter invoices from June 1, 2025 to Dec 1, 2025:

```
"select_filters": {
  "when": {
      "gte": 1748736000,
      "lte": 1764547200
    }
  }
```

Supported operators:

- `gt` or `gte`: invoices created after this time
- `lt` or `lte`: invoices created before this time

Optional : Filter invoices by service using `service` field.

Supported services:
transfer, stripe\_payments, bitpay, coinbase, crypto.com, instance\_prepay, paypal\_manual, wise\_manual

Supported operators:

- `in` : include only these services
- `notin` : exclude these services
- `eq` : matches a single service

Example: Get paypal and wise invoices only

```
"service": {
  "in": ["paypal_manual", "wise_manual"]
}
```

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-invoices#body-latest-first)

latest\_first

boolean

default:true

Sort by newest invoices first.

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-invoices#body-order-by)

order\_by

object\[\]

Sort invoices by given columns.

Supported columns: `paid_on`, `amount_cents`, `when`

Example : To sort by oldest invoices first

```
"order_by": [\
  {\
    "col": "when",\
    "dir": "asc"\
  }\
]
```

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-invoices#body-limit)

limit

integer

default:60

Maximum number of invoices to return.

#### Response

200

application/json

Paginated invoice results

[Suggest edits](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/edit/main/api-reference/billing/show-invoices.mdx) [Raise issue](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/issues/new?title=Issue%20on%20docs&body=Path:%20/api-reference/billing/show-invoices)

[show earnings](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-earnings)

Ctrl+I

Assistant

Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes.

metadata.ogDescription: Gets your invoices within given timerange. Timerange is required using the select_filters.when field. Optionally filter by invoice service using select_filters.service. Common services : transfer, stripe_payments, bitpay, coinbase, crypto.com, instance_prepay, paypal_manual, wise_manual Date format: select_filters.when.gte and select_filters.when.lte must be UTC epoch seconds (integers). Example range: 2026-01-01 00:00:00 UTC -> 1767225600, 2026-01-31 23:59:59 UTC -> 1769903999. HTTP request: This is a GET endpoint that accepts JSON-encoded query parameters. URL-encode JSON values when calling directly. GET /api/v1/invoices/?select_filters={"when":{"gte":1767225600,"lte":1769903999}}&limit=60 For pagination, pass the response next_token as after_token: GET /api/v1/invoices/?select_filters={"when":{"gte":1767225600,"lte":1769903999}}&after_token=eyJ2YWx1ZXMiOiB7ImlkIjog... CLI Usage: vastai show invoices-v1
